title: Twilight Treehouses
description: Treehouse dungeons now generate in the Twilight Forest!
body:
__![](https://i.postimg.cc/MKKN9q6g/twilight-treehouse-banner.png)

**Twilight Treehouses** adds 4 new structures to the Twilight Forest! These tree houses can be used as temporary residence in this dimension, and will also contain modded loot. Skeleton Druids spawn in these structures, in a similar way to Twilight's druid huts, however, spawners can be cleared out to claim the treehouse for yourself!

REQUIRES TWILIGHT FOREST!
